name: Local Loop - Review and Code (1 min, lock-guarded)

parameters.command:
LOCK=/tmp/local-loop-agent.lock
if ! mkdir "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo 'SKIP: already running'
  exit 0
fi
trap "rmdir '$LOCK' 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT
cd /home/cbk/qwen-agent-collective && OLLAMA_CODE_MODEL=qwen3-next-cbk:latest node agents/local_loop/run.mjs 2>&1
